English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Pauline Kolenda papers
Kolenda, Pauline.
8456
40 cubic feet. 40 cubic feet.
1950-1999. Digital Media, Correspondence, Printed Material, Research Material Collection consists of field notes and research files. Collection material in English 8491805
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
June 2014
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, June 2014
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, December 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Pauline Kolenda was an anthropologist who studied India.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Collection consists of field notes and research files.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Kanyakumari Study
Series II. Khalapur materials
Series III. Miscellaneous
Cite As:
Pauline Kolenda Papers, #8456. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
India -- Civilization Villages -- India. Caste -- India Families -- India.
